full_text:
Lady Cui 崔夫人
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Cui (崔夫人). Wife of Liu Chen, she killed herself by running into a pillar to join her husband. Lady Cui may not have existed in history. Lady Cui was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
